product: Vector Search is now AI Search
tagline: Vector Search has been renamed to AI Search.
what_it_does: Vector Search has been renamed to AI Search. You can now create full text search indexes without any vectors or embeddings needed. Databricks AI Search (formerly Databricks Vector Search) is a search solution that is built into the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform and integrated with its governance and productivity tools.
why_it_matters: Databricks AI Search (formerly Databricks Vector Search) is a search solution that is built into the Databricks Data Intelligence Platform and integrated with its governance and productivity tools.
